name: The White House
subject: The Engine of the American Dream
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c1bad8644ac830bbdb7036a8e71482786b6d8b961023ebdbbd0a31ced9d9cc5fca34e7494f9855582863139506c68bddfe5eacdc92924eea

Today, President Donald J. Trump is participating in an American small business event,
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c1bad8644ac830bb8ee8e8e1204209220d3f23e75f92468e31a5682305032153b038e2c5469b88c3fa10f9788fbbf3174d3439ecca3b5476
The Engine of the American Dream, where he will continue to deliver his message for prioritizing the American worker and American jobs. Today's event will highlight the President's policies designed to grow the economy and create jobs and will feature the Small Business Administration’s mission to support small businesses.

-------------

President Trump Presents the Medal of Honor to former Specialist Five James C. McCloughan

Yesterday, President Trump awarded the Medal of Honor to former Specialist Five James C. McCloughan for distinguished actions during 48 hours of close-combat fighting against enemy forces near Don Que, Vietnam, from May 13 to 15, 1969.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c1bad8644ac830bb150b1f3a5551027da605e8fcaf7098d01d8a2f65ee9b14bbe878e11a6d59072f059379f5c6eb4c3ac8b0b335b267f577
Read more

Vice President Pence Delivers Remarks to Enhanced Forward Presence and Estonian Troops

"The President personally sent me here -- to this place, at this time, to thank all of you who have stood up and stepped forward to protect this alliance, to protect our values, and to stand in the gap for our of way of life."

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c1bad8644ac830bb8be4474c689e30c7817aea479de70c88451100afe8977be7884a9fef9c85ac7d05e988eaba6f2be9efa292b5ce06cfee
Read the full speech

President Trump Leads a Cabinet Meeting

Yesterday, President Trump met with his Cabinet at the White House where he congratulated General John Kelly on his accomplishments at the Department of Homeland Security and on his new role as White House Chief of Staff. The President also discussed several of his Administration’s economic accomplishments including the lowest unemployment rate in over 15 years.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c1bad8644ac830bbec98de9477578cfb5789916437c5ed55e58e0068af7ad58aa71c730abe04831f1b6269e7c13e7fedbbc9db989141c357
Watch the video

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump presents the Medal of Honor to Specialist Five James C. McCloughan | July 31, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead)

POTUS and VP TODAY

Today, President Trump will participate in an American small business event, The Engine of the American Dream.
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c1bad8644ac830bb8ee8e8e1204209220d3f23e75f92468e31a5682305032153b038e2c5469b88c3fa10f9788fbbf3174d3439ecca3b5476
Watch live at 3:00 PM EST. Vice President Pence participated in a press conference with Prime Minister Giorgi Kvrikashvili and delivered remarks to U.S. and Georgian Noble Partner Participants.

Coming Up This Week

The Vice President will continue traveling across Eastern Europe to strengthen America's partnerships.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c1bad8644ac830bbc3d214bcc0285334a15a8ae166d15174b31168f788eb5c9694e993e51e82ece6076d58ece5f8ade39af4bc5203fcc81d
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c1bad8644ac830bb8d1493bf3099b33a548ad139f85cbb10c71e3720874973684b173e93bfd7f866aebba7d911c6235b1865fad805981208
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d45afd04129ffaebec904be25857da69eaa6cf2ed0a5d215e25e2398f15e3ba3ce6a4c5061d7c599198dfdfc4b0cc1db83
Unsubscribe

Read more Vice President Pence Delivers Remarks to Enhanced Forward Presence and Estonian Troops "The President personally sent me here -- to this place, at this time, to thank all of you who have stood up and stepped forward to protect this alliance, to protect our values, and to stand in the gap for our of way of life." Read the full speech President Trump Leads a Cabinet Meeting Yesterday, President Trump met with his Cabinet at the White House where he congratulated General John Kelly on his accomplishments at the Department of Homeland Security and on his new role as White House Chief of Staff. The President also discussed several of his Administration’s economic accomplishments including the lowest unemployment rate in over 15 years. Watch the video Photo of the Day President Donald J. Trump presents the Medal of Honor to Specialist Five James C. McCloughan | July 31, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead) POTUS and VP TODAY Today, President Trump will participate in an American small business event, The Engine of the American Dream. Watch live at 3:00 PM EST. Vice President Pence participated in a press conference with Prime Minister Giorgi Kvrikashvili and delivered remarks to U.S. and Georgian Noble Partner Participants. Coming Up This Week The Vice President will continue traveling across Eastern Europe to strengthen America's partnerships.

name: Sen. Chris Van Hollen (via DSCC.org)
subject: Thank you for protecting health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Thanks for working so hard over the last seven months to ensure that the Senate did the right thing last week!
---
[****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20170801-VanHollen-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Team,

Many thanks for working so hard over the last seven months to ensure that the Senate did the right thing for the American people last week!

Because of your efforts, the Senate voted down a "skinny repeal" plan that would, according to the nonpartisan Congressional Budget Office, have left 16 million Americans uninsured next year while raising premiums every year by up to 20%.

This unconscionable bill was stopped because people like you called, went to town halls, courageously shared your stories, and never gave up on the fight to make sure this and other harmful plans did not become law.

Thank you as well for your support of the DSCC ahead of yesterday's FEC deadline -- you stepped up in a big way to stand with the Senate Democrats who blocked the GOP repeal effort and to support our effort to repeal and replace the Congressional Republicans who tried to rip away health care for millions of Americans.

While America can take a sigh a relief, we must remain vigilant because these zombie Trumpcare bills keep popping up even after you think they are dead and buried.

Most importantly, in the coming days, we must build on what we have to ensure a future where every American has access to affordable, quality health care.

Thank you for standing with Senate Democrats in our fight to stop the GOP plan that would have put the lives and livelihood of millions of people at risk!

Onwards,
Senator Chris Van Hollen

**A quick note on donations, team:**

When we say that we're counting on grassroots donors to protect Senate Democrats, we're not kidding. In fact, a full 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. name: Democrats.org
subject: Sign our birthday card for President Obama, Derek
body:
Say "Happy Birthday" to Barack Obama.
---
**Sign your name to wish President Obama a happy birthday.

** **[SIGN THE CARD, DEREK](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Happy-Birthday-President-Obama-20171?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+SIGN+THE+CARDCUSTOMDATASETslugwhitelistc&utm_campaign=em_20170801_joc_nd2&source=em_20170801_joc_nd2")**
Derek --

The first bill that President Obama signed into law was the Lilly Ledbetter Fair Pay Act. I like to think that first act set the tone for his administration: devoting every single day in office to making life better for the American people.

Rescuing our economy from the brink of disaster, reforming Wall Street, signing the Affordable Care Act, repealing "Don't Ask, Don't Tell," taking bold action on climate change and signing the Paris Climate Agreement, putting the protections of DACA and DAPA into place -- there are more accomplishments than you can list. It's a legacy that I'm incredibly grateful for and proud to be fighting for every day.

President Obama's birthday is on Friday, and we're sending him a card -- not only to celebrate his special day, but also to thank him for all he's done for us and make sure he knows we're still fighting for the values that defined his presidency.

**Sign your name and wish President Obama a very happy birthday:**

**[SIGN THE CARD, DEREK](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Happy-Birthday-President-Obama-20171?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+SIGN+THE+CARDCUSTOMDATASETslugwhitelistc&utm_campaign=em_20170801_joc_nd2&source=em_20170801_joc_nd2")**
Thanks,

Jess

Jess O'Connell
Chief Executive Officer
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523064/4067b0a/328a27a84/7e6cd01a/1510063200/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170801_joc_nd2&source=em_20170801_joc_nd2"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523064/4067b0a/328a27a84/7e6cd01b/1510063200/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170801_joc_nd2&source=em_20170801_joc_nd2"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523064/4067b0a/328a27a84/7e6cd018/1510063200/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170801_joc_nd2&source=em_20170801_joc_nd2") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523064/4067b0a/328a27a84/7e6cd019/1510063200/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170801_joc_nd2&source=em_20170801_joc_nd2"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Leigh K. Warren, EMILY's List
subject: Take a moment to feel good about this, Peter
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c651c/24c69fd9/bace67ea/1898fd14/3422505051/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQENE802N_digital_email_20170801_ThankYouJuly_inact&source=WQENE802N_digital_email_20170801_ThankYouJuly_inact")
---

Peter,

I wanted to say thank you.

Our End-of-Month deadline was no match for this community and honestly, I'm not surprised. With every challenge that is put before us, month after month, we resist and persist.

When we're up against so much, it can feel like there aren't many wins to get excited about or time to do so. But small victories like hitting our End-of-Month goal _deserve to be celebrated._

Celebrate building strong campaigns for our dozens of endorsed candidates! Celebrate creating the programming and community to support the over 16,000 women who've told us they want to run for office! Celebrate still resisting six months into this administration!

I could not be more proud that we are in this fight together. Let's celebrate all our successes together -- big and small.

Thanks,

Leigh K. Warren
Chief Operating Officer, EMILY's List

name: Team Maggie for Women Project
subject: Join us: Become a founding member [Team Maggie for Women Project]

body:
[](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdedb/2a380d31/1eb65adb/fe5dbb/669757126/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdedb/2a380d31/1eb65adb/fe5dbb/669757126/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hello,
2018 is going to be a tough year for Democrats, and it could be an even tougher year for women.
10 Democratic woman Senators are up for reelection - that's nearly half of all of the women currently serving in the Senate!
With Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump trying to chip away at _Roe v. Wade_ and working to defund Planned Parenthood, we can't afford to lose a single one.
That's why we're launching the Team Maggie for Women Project - Team Maggie's effort to make sure that every single Democratic woman running in 2018 has the resources she needs to win.
So what do you say, everyone? Are you ready to join the team working to elect Democratic women to the Senate?
**We 're kicking things off with two of the strongest voices we have for hard-working families: Senators Elizabeth Warren and Tammy Baldwin. [Donate $3 or more now to become a founding donor of the Team Maggie for Women Project, and your gift will help reelect these two women to the Senate.](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdedb/2a380d31/1eb65adb/fe5da4/669757126/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxN193b21lbnByb2plY3RfdGItZXciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDczMV9XU0ZfYWN0IiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2017_womenproject_tb-ew?refcode=e20170731_WSF_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
Here's why this matters:
Without Elizabeth Warren, we wouldn't have the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, an agency that holds Wall Street and corporate billionaires accountable.
Without Tammy Baldwin, we wouldn't have our first openly LGBTQ Senator and powerful advocate to let children stay on their parents' health insurance until age 26.
[**If reelecting these women sounds like something you want to be a part of (and it definitely should!), give $3 or more now to support their campaigns and get in on the ground level of the Team Maggie for Women Project.**](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdedb/2a380d31/1eb65adb/fe5da4/669757126/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxN193b21lbnByb2plY3RfdGItZXciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDczMV9XU0ZfYWN0IiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2017_womenproject_tb-ew?refcode=e20170731_WSF_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

clean_body: "" "" Hello, 2018 is going to be a tough year for Democrats, and it could be an even tougher year for women. 10 Democratic woman Senators are up for reelection - that's nearly half of all of the women currently serving in the Senate! With Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump trying to chip away at Roe v. Wade and working to defund Planned Parenthood, we can't afford to lose a single one. That's why we're launching the Team Maggie for Women Project - Team Maggie's effort to make sure that every single Democratic woman running in 2018 has the resources she needs to win. So what do you say, everyone? Are you ready to join the team working to elect Democratic women to the Senate? We 're kicking things off with two of the strongest voices we have for hard-working families: Senators Elizabeth Warren and Tammy Baldwin. "" Here's why this matters: Without Elizabeth Warren, we wouldn't have the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, an agency that holds Wall Street and corporate billionaires accountable. Without Tammy Baldwin, we wouldn't have our first openly LGBTQ Senator and powerful advocate to let children stay on their parents' health insurance until age 26. "" Thanks for being part of this, and thank you for supporting Democratic women. -- Team Maggie ""

name: Republican Party of New Hampshire
subject: NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester Statement on Health Insurance Increases for 2018
body:
PRESS RELEASE

For Immediate Release: August 1, 2017

Contact: Patrick Hynes, 202-321-5310

Statement from NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester on Obamacare
Exchange Increases

CONCORD- NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester released the following
statement regarding the massive planned increase in the New
Hampshire Obamacare exchanges for 2018:

“The Democrats are fooling no one when they talk about wanting
to reform healthcare. Rather than bringing forward substantive
ideas to fix the disastrous healthcare problem they created, New
Hampshire Democrats are using rhetoric to hide their lack of
results, accomplishments, and leadership. Their solution to
stabilizing NH’s individual healthcare market is to pin it on the
backs of New Hampshire’s taxpayers. It is clear that the
Democrats in the House & Senate have no ideas other than to
increase taxes and burden consumers who are already struggling
with some of the highest healthcare costs in the nation."

"Democratic Party leaders should look to the Bipartisan Joint
Health Care Reform Oversight Committee’s unanimous embrace of
Governor Sununu’s plan to allow the New Hampshire Department of
Insurance to pursue the waiver without the assessment to New
Hampshire’s carriers."

"Governor Sununu has rightfully made it clear that now is the
time for all sides to bring new ideas forward that do not double
down on the failed policies of Obamacare. Now is the time for
serious solutions. Fortunately, it appears that Republicans are
willing to get to work to defend the taxpayers of New Hampshire."

###
